source_pr.title: ddl: Fix the bug that showing status row count is 0

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky under `make race` due to concurrent access to shared DDL job state (row count) without proper synchronization. This PR stabilizes it by using `sync/atomic` Load/Store for row count fields so the race detector no longer reports a data race.
fix_pattern: Use sync/atomic (or locks) to synchronize shared state updates in async DDL reorg code (e.g., job row count) to avoid data races.

evidence: files: ddl/column.go, ddl/column_change_test.go, ddl/ddl.go, ddl/index.go, ddl/index_change_test.go, ddl/reorg.go, ddl/reorg_test.go, model/ddl.go
